verification_gate: rusty-idd pre-existing dirt resolved upgrade-only (hook capability restored, not deleted); the 4 task systems merged again via the ESTATE-INSTALLED envctl tools; DEEP retention verify proves logic, blobs, semantics, metadata, features/functions, and contracts are retained in a seamless one-command workflow; all changes committed and PRs merged.
proof_summary: Follow-on to IDD-UNIFY-001. (1) rusty-idd's long-standing dirty tree ('.codex/config.toml hooks=false' + deleted hooks.json) decoded: the committed hooks ran 'cargo run … rusty-idd' on every Codex lifecycle event but cargo is absent from login PATH, so hooks had been disabled locally by DELETION — a capability loss. Upgrade-only fix (PR #141): rusty-idd 0.1.0 installed to usr/bin (login PATH serves it), hooks.json restored with all 6 commands rewritten binary-first with the original cargo-run retained verbatim as fallback, hooks=true stands; every hook verb proven live (next, workflow-check pre/post/stop x2, env-check — the SessionStart hook executed via its exact sh -lc command string). (2) usr/bin/envctl is a symlink to the repo's target/release build; rebuilding merged master (PR #440 incl. the redb 2.6 MSRV pin) put 'envctl migration' on the estate PATH — verified live. (3) The one-command E2E ran with ESTATE binaries (envctl + rusty-idd from usr/bin): acceptance A-E green again (byte parity IDENTICAL 4/4: kb 419/meta 2/handoff 340/idd 83; kb 133 docs + hf 56 tasks + idd same-findings + meta parse; verb matrix 0 unmapped; 1 gap enumerated+approved; deny-then-approve agent review), replay verify-only --verify-files 11/11, unified-tree lock IDENTICAL to all prior runs (3f92a5dfa9291853e904b302bea60ef89362f62452c65304daacdce118ff0a2f) — deterministic across store major (redb 4->2.6) and across binaries. (4) NEW --deep retention verify (nu_plugin PR #11), six recorded validations, all pass: METADATA unix-mode manifests identical 4/4; LOGIC/FUNCTIONS a real git-kb create+commit+show through the .kb compat symlink on a throwaway copy of the exported tree; SEMANTICS DB wikilink edges == independent recount (96 == 96; corrects IDD-UNIFY-001 prose which said 566 — the measured, crosschecked figure is 96); BLOB PROVENANCE 4/4 stores self-report sha256; FEATURES live verb surfaces (git-kb 99 / hf 10 / rusty-idd 25 / envctl migration 36 help lines); CONTRACTS 6/6 contract artifacts recorded complete. Deep run: e2e/run-20260707-060342, 11 ops, 6 artifacts, 0 open approvals.

live_commands.purpose: hook verbs proven with the installed binary
live_commands.command: rusty-idd next --base .; rusty-idd codex workflow-check --workspace . --phase pre-tool; rusty-idd codex env-check --workspace .; sh -lc '<exact SessionStart hook command>'
output: front door renders active change unify-handoff-prompthub; workflow-check reports findings (its job); env-check: invariant check passed; hook command exit 0
